news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust Bloomberg Emerging Market Democracies ETF

holdings.infoBox: EMDM is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 12.16%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 11.34%, SK hynix at 7.90%, Grupo Mexico SAB de CV Class B at 3.95%, and OTP Bank Nyrt. at 2.11%.

overview.description: The First Trust Bloomberg Emerging Market Democracies ETF (EMDM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund follows a principles-based index of large- and mid-cap companies located in emerging market countries considered to have electoral democracy. Holdings are weighted based on a combination of governance score and market capitalization. EMDM was launched on Mar 2, 2023 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust Bloomberg Emerging Market Democracies ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
